description: Squad mission lifecycle hooks — prevent premature termination during active missions

hooks.prompt: Use the Bash tool to run: `cat .claude/squad/state/active-mission.md 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_ACTIVE`. If the output is NOT_ACTIVE (file does not exist), approve stopping immediately. If the output shows mission content, block stopping with: 'Squad mission still in progress at stage [X from file content]. Use /squad:squad --abort to safely abort before stopping.'
